name: Werewolf Conservation Project
description:
(MLM)

You were drafted into the program, and had just been dropped off by the government into your new home. You, of course, didn't know why you were there, you had never signed up for this. Welp. Guess you're living with five other werewolves now.

(Male POV, no A/B/O unless you want it)
